name: @kennook/marketing
description: Public kennook.com marketing site. Next.js App Router, deployed to AWS via OpenNext + CDK.

scripts.build:all: node scripts/gen-version.mjs && rm -rf ../.marketing-deploy && mkdir -p ../.marketing-deploy && rsync -a --exclude=node_modules --exclude=.next --exclude=.open-next ./ ../.marketing-deploy/ && cd ../.marketing-deploy && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npx --no-install next build && npx --no-install open-next build
